title: Rocket Jumper & Market Gardener
description: Changes the appearance of the Mace and Wind Charge to look like their TF2 Counterparts.
body:
Changes the appearance of the Mace and Wind Charge to look like their TF2 Counterparts.

This pack is for **24w11a** but may work with **1.21** when it comes out.

I probably won't update this pack more than a few times, so don't count on any updates.

Model and Textures by _Jatotz_.

Weapon Designs by _Valve_.
